AnalysisOperation - Class in pl.polsl.entity
JPA Entity representing a single analysis operation.

Default constructor required by JPA.

JPA Entity representing detailed results of an analysis operation.

Default constructor required by JPA.

Servlet handling stock analysis requests with JPA persistence.

Enum representing different types of stock analysis.

Calculates Pearson correlation between opening price and volume.

Compares by closing price for sorting.

I

init() - Method in class pl.polsl.servlet.AnalysisServlet
Initializes model, view, and EntityManagerFactory (called once per application lifecycle).

Initializes view with model reference and gets EMF.

Loads data from CSV file using streams.

O

open() - Method in record class pl.polsl.model.StockRecord

P

pl.polsl.entity - package pl.polsl.entity
Package containing JPA entity classes for Tesla stock analysis application.
pl.polsl.model - package pl.polsl.model
Package containing model class for Tesla stock analysis application.
pl.polsl.servlet - package pl.polsl.servlet
Package containing servlet classes for Tesla stock analysis web application.
pl.polsl.view - package pl.polsl.view
Package containing view classes for Tesla stock analysis web application.
PRICE_SORTING - Enum constant in enum class pl.polsl.model.AnalysisType
Analysis for price sorting.
PRICE_VOLUME_CORRELATION - Enum constant in enum class pl.polsl.model.AnalysisType
Analysis for price-volume correlation.
printCookieInfo(PrintWriter, String, String) - Method in class pl.polsl.view.StockView
Prints cookie information with clear labels about data source.
printDataLoadedMessage(PrintWriter, int) - Method in class pl.polsl.view.StockView
Prints success message for data loading.
printError(PrintWriter, String) - Method in class pl.polsl.view.StockView
Prints error message in HTML format.
printHighestVolumeDay(PrintWriter, StockRecord) - Method in class pl.polsl.view.StockView
Prints analysis result for highest volume day.
printHighestVolumeYear(PrintWriter, int) - Method in class pl.polsl.view.StockView
Prints analysis result for highest volume year.
printHistory(PrintWriter, List<String>) - Method in class pl.polsl.view.StockView
Prints analysis history.
printHistoryPage(PrintWriter, List<Object>, String, String, boolean, int) - Method in class pl.polsl.view.StockView
Prints history page with database operations and cookie information.
printHtmlEnd(PrintWriter) - Method in class pl.polsl.view.StockView
Prints HTML document end with navigation links.
printHtmlStart(PrintWriter, String) - Method in class pl.polsl.view.StockView
Prints HTML document start.
printPriceSorting(PrintWriter, List<StockRecord>) - Method in class pl.polsl.view.StockView
Prints price sorted data (limited to first 20 records).
printPriceVolumeCorrelation(PrintWriter, double) - Method in class pl.polsl.view.StockView
Prints price-volume correlation result.
processRequest(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class pl.polsl.servlet.AnalysisServlet
Processes requests for both HTTP GET and POST methods.
processRequest(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class pl.polsl.servlet.HistoryServlet
Processes requests for both HTTP GET and POST methods.

StockModel - Class in pl.polsl.model
Model for Tesla stock data analysis.

Constructs StockModel.
StockRecord - Record Class in pl.polsl.model
Record representing Tesla stock data for a single day.

Creates an instance of a StockRecord record class.

View class for Tesla stock analysis web application.
